name: pos_team_orchestrator_agent
description: POS Team orchestrator — routes requests to the appropriate domain agent: Android mobile, Backoffice architecture, QA validation, or DSP bug reporting

agentSpawn.description: Inject available agents registry for dynamic delegation

welcomeMessage:
👋 POS Team Orchestrator ready!

I route your requests to the right specialist:
  📱 Android mobile → android_arch_agent
  🏗️ Backend architecture → pos_architecture_agent
  ✅ QA validation → qa_validation_agent
  🐛 DSP bug reports → dsp_bug_report_agent

Just describe what you need and I'll delegate to the right agent.
